info.name: AppyWay Explorer API
Authorities
AppyWay Fetch an authority by ID

items.docs: Returns a specific authority by its ID

info.name: AppyWay Find authority ids by viewport

items.docs: Returns the Ids of authorities that are at least partially within the specified GeoJson viewport.

info.name: Bulk
AppyWay Fetches entities by their IDs

items.docs: Retrieve a bulk list of entities of different types by their IDs

info.name: Parking
AppyWay Fetch event dates by id

items.docs: Searches for event dates with the supplied entity ID.

info.name: AppyWay Fetch operating hours by id

items.docs: Searches for operating hours with the supplied entity ID.

info.name: AppyWay Fetch operating hours by ids

items.docs: Searches for operating hours with the supplied entities IDs.

info.name: AppyWay Fetch a parking Entity by ID

items.docs: Retrieves a parking entity by its ID

info.name: AppyWay Fetch a parking quote by id

items.docs:
Searches for a parking result with the supplied ID. Result indicates whether parking is allowed at the location.
If parking is allowed for all or part of the requested window,
the result contains a list of quotes containing information such as price, payment methods, maximum stay and no return policy.

info.name: AppyWay Fetch parking quotes by ids

items.docs:
Searches for a parking result with the supplied IDs. Result indicates whether parking is allowed at the location.
If parking is allowed for all or part of the requested window,
the result contains a list of quotes containing information such as price, payment methods, maximum stay and no return policy.

info.name: AppyWay Fetch payment providers by parking entity ID

items.docs: Returns payment providers for the given parking entity ID

info.name: AppyWay Find parking entities by centre and viewport size

items.docs:
This query creates a square viewport with the centre at ViewportCentre and side length of ViewportSize.
It then returns a list of all the parking entities within the bounds of that polygon, along with their distance from the DistanceCalculationLocation if supplied,
or the viewport centre if not. Entities are ordered by this distance.

info.name: AppyWay Find parking entities by viewport

items.docs:
This query creates a custom viewport from the supplied GeoJson polygon.
It then returns a list of all the parking entities within the bounds of that polygon, along with their distance from the DistanceCalculationLocation if supplied,
or the viewport centre if not. Entities are ordered by this distance.

info.name: AppyWay Find parking quotes by centre and viewport size

items.docs:
This query creates a square viewport with the centre at ViewportCentre and side length of ViewportSize.
It then returns a list of search results for all parking entities within the bounds of that polygon.
Results are ordered by proximity to the DistanceCalculationLocation if supplied, or the viewport centre if not.
            
Each result indicates whether parking is allowed at that location. If parking is allowed for all or part of the requested window,
the result contains a list of quote

info.name: AppyWay Find parking quotes by viewport

items.docs:
This query creates a custom viewport from the supplied GeoJson polygon.
It then returns a list of search results for all parking entities within the bounds of that polygon.
Results are ordered by proximity to the DistanceCalculationLocation if supplied, or the viewport centre if not.
            
Each result indicates whether parking is allowed at that location. If parking is allowed for all or part of the requested window,
the result contains a list of quotes containing information such as

info.name: Zones
AppyWay Fetch a zone by ID

items.docs: Returns a specific zone by its ID

info.name: AppyWay Fetch zone default rules by id

items.docs: Returns default rules for parking entities by zone ID.

info.name: AppyWay Find zone default rules by viewport

items.docs: Returns default rules for parking entities for zones that are at least partially within the specified GeoJson viewport.

info.name: Status
AppyWay Ping
